_meta.description: QC360 Resolver Service Contracts — canonical interface definitions for all backend rating resolvers

zipToArea.description: Resolves a ZIP code to a deterministic rating area using PlanZipAreaMap. Plan-specific mappings take precedence over global mappings.

zip.description: Raw ZIP — will be normalized internally

planId.description: FK → BenefitPlan — uses plan-specific mapping if available

dobToAgeBand.description: Converts a date of birth to age and ACA standard age band code as of a given effective date. Never trust age/band from spreadsheet formulas.

dob.description: ISO date string or Excel serial number

tierNormalize.description: Maps raw tier text from any source (workbook, census, carrier file) to QC360 canonical tier codes.

output.normalized: EE | ES | EC | FAM | null (null = unknown/reject)

rateResolve.description: Point lookup for a single monthly rate given the full rating key. Used for single-member spot checks and QA.

rateScheduleId.description: If omitted, uses any active schedule for planId

importRateRows.description: Batch-validates and persists rate detail rows from a parsed CSV/array. Creates an ImportRun audit record and per-row ImportException records for all failures.

rows.description: Array of raw row objects from parsed CSV

validation_sequence: 1. Check required fields (rating_area_code, age_band_code, tier_code, monthly_rate)
2. Normalize tier via tierNormalizer — reject unknown
5. Warn if age_band_code not in ACA_STANDARD_10

importZipRows.description: Batch-validates and persists ZIP-to-area mapping rows. Creates ImportRun and ImportException records.
validation_sequence: 1. Normalize ZIP — reject if not valid 5-digit
4. Check duplicate ZIP + effective_date within batch

rateCensus.description: Full case rating pipeline. Iterates all eligible CensusMember rows for a case, resolves each through the full rating chain, persists CaseRatedResult rows, and creates an ImportRun audit record.

rateScheduleId.description: If omitted, uses latest active schedule

internal_flow: 2. Fetch all CensusMember rows for caseId
3. For each member: normalize ZIP → zipToAreaResolver
4. For each member: normalize DOB → age → ageToBandResolver
5. For each member: normalize tier → tierNormalizer
6. planRateResolver(planId, rateScheduleId, area, band, tier, tobacco)
7. On success: write CaseRatedResult row with rating_status=rated
8. On failure: write CaseRatedResult row with rating_status=exception, log ImportException
9. Finalize ImportRun with counts and status

output.member_results: array — per-member rated rows with errors

validateRateSchedule.description: Validates all PlanRateDetail rows for a schedule. Checks for missing fields, invalid tiers, duplicate keys, and tier completeness per area+band combination. Updates PlanRateSchedule.validation_status.
checks: no duplicate rate key: area + band + tier + tobacco
every area+band combination has all 4 tier codes

seedAgeBandSchema.description: Admin-only. Seeds the ACA Standard 10-Band age schema into AgeBandSchema if not already present. Idempotent.
